mapper.sql: id, file_id, original_name, server_file_name, file_path, file_size, upload_time, process_status, process_time, output_file_path, error_message, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.update: UPDATE sas_xpt_upload SET file_size = #{fileSize}, upload_time = #{uploadTime}, process_status = #{processStatus}, process_time = #{processTime}, output_file_path = #{outputFilePath}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sas_xpt_upload WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM sas_xpt_upload WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY upload_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sas_xpt_upload SET process_status = #{processStatus}, process_time = NOW(), output_file_path = #{outputFilePath}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = NOW() WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
